rules.name: Official source first
rules.pass_condition: The article links at least one official authority source and no non-official source is treated as the final authority.
rules.failure_action: Keep the content_job in needs_review or reject it.

rules.name: Practical impact present
rules.pass_condition: The article includes a practical impact section that states operational or engineering consequences.
rules.failure_action: Keep the content_job in needs_review and revise the article before approval.

rules.name: What to do now present
rules.pass_condition: The article includes a specific what-to-do-now or this-week action block.
rules.failure_action: Keep the content_job in needs_review and revise the article before approval.

rules.name: CTA present
rules.pass_condition: The article contains a CTA block that matches the current site template.
rules.failure_action: Keep the content_job in needs_review until the article matches the template.

rules.name: Exact duplicate title check
rules.pass_condition: No existing published or scheduled article has the exact same normalized title.
rules.failure_action: Reject the content_job or revise the article before approval.

rules.name: Near-duplicate similarity check
rules.pass_condition: No previously approved or published article exceeds the configured duplicate similarity threshold.
rules.failure_action: Keep the content_job in needs_review and escalate to an editor for rewrite, merge, or rejection.
